aboutParagraphs: hey, i'm raghav. i build on solana across the stack, from on-chain programs and rust tooling to full stack engineering
right now i'm focused on rust, systems, protocol design, and product engineering. member at superteam india.

bullets: 2,200+ users · AI assistant at 96% accuracy on Solana/Rust/Anchor queries
RAG pipeline over 100+ docs via pgvector · live Rust/Anchor compilation sandbox
1,100+ exercises completed in production, zero bugs
50+ github stars · featured in Colosseum newsletter for ecosystem impact
Built 4+ full-stack structural design modules using React, Django, and REST APIs
Developed 2 steel design modules from scratch based on IS 800:2007 with 15+ validation checks
Resolved critical CAD generation and session workflow bugs across 7+ modules
Reduced debugging time by 60%+ through logging, error isolation, and API refactoring
Built a session-based chat persistence layer handling 500+ daily conversations with no data loss.
Built a user feedback pipeline that collected 1,200+ ratings and drove a 15% improvement in model accuracy
Fixed critical bugs affecting 5,000+ users, pushing satisfaction scores from 3.5 to 4.2/5
Cut image load times by 20% by moving delivery to a CDN

projects.name: LearnSol
projects.desc: Free, open-source Solana learning platform with project-based lessons, interactive exercises, gamified challenges, and built-in AI help.

projects.name: CipherPay
projects.desc: Private payroll and payout workspace for Solana with single-pay and batch payroll flows, durable payout-run state, and a shielded private payout rail.
projects.meta: Private payouts · batch payroll · ZK rail

projects.name: AvaLaunch
projects.desc: AI agent for end-to-end L1 launch and management, turning plain English into a working Avalanche network with a deterministic launch plan.

projects.name: Pigeon
projects.desc: Privacy-focused Solana wallet superapp with encrypted wallet-to-wallet chat live on devnet, on-chain message history, and private transfer/swap research routes in progress.
projects.meta: Encrypted chat · Privacy · Live on Devnet

projects.name: CPMM
projects.desc: On-chain constant product market maker on Solana. x·y=k for token swaps and liquidity provision. PDA-controlled token vaults. Deposit, swap, withdraw — atomic.
projects.meta: On-chain AMM · SPL tokens · PDA vaults

projects.name: Escrow
projects.desc: Trustless on-chain escrow in Anchor/Rust. Deposit, refund, take — secured via PDA-controlled SPL token vaults. Atomic settlement, no off-chain intermediaries.

projects.name: Flash Loan
projects.desc: Flash loan protocol in Anchor that lends from a PDA-controlled vault, enforces same-transaction repayment through instructions-sysvar introspection, and charges a fixed fee on atomic repay.
projects.meta: Atomic repay checks · PDA vault authority · LiteSVM tests

projects.name: Pinocchio Vault
projects.desc: Single-asset tokenized vault in Pinocchio. Deposits SPL tokens into PDA custody, mints proportional vault shares, burns shares on withdraw, and enforces pause plus two-step admin controls.
projects.meta: Tokenized vault · PDA custody · LiteSVM-tested SBF

projects.name: MPMC Queue
projects.desc: Bounded multi-producer multi-consumer queue in Rust. Mutex/Condvar, blocking + non-blocking modes. 72.3M ops/sec. 13 integration tests. Zero unsafe code.

projects.name: solana-txn-tui
projects.desc: Published Rust crate for exploring Solana transactions and accounts in the terminal. cargo install, Homebrew, or curl. Fee breakdown, instruction details, token transfers. Mainnet / Devnet / Testnet.

projects.name: Observer
projects.desc: Self-hosted Solana observability indexer in Rust. Uses WebSocket slot updates plus RPC block fetches, Postgres upserts, and a persisted cursor for crash-safe resume. Built for near real-time network health and protocol risk monitoring.
projects.meta: Crash-safe resume · Idempotent upserts · Protocol risk monitoring

projects.name: Omniscanner
projects.desc: Rust borrower-risk scanner for Omnipair with local scoring, pool stress tracking, liquidation alerts, PostgreSQL persistence, and a small operator dashboard served from the app.
projects.meta: Borrower risk alerts · Axum API · Built-in dashboard

projects.name: Rayscan
projects.desc: Search-first Solana explorer with live transaction visibility, token pages, network stats, and an indexed backend built with Fastify, WebSockets, and Postgres.
projects.meta: Explorer UI · Live tx feed · Indexed chain data

projects.name: PixelMart
projects.desc: NFT marketplace on Solana with a Next.js frontend and an Anchor marketplace program for listings, buys, marketplace state, and wallet-signed flows.
projects.meta: NFT marketplace · Next.js + Anchor · Live demo

projects.name: Loopscale Borrow Shopper
projects.desc: Consumer-facing Next.js app for finding fixed-rate borrow routes on Loopscale, reviewing the best visible route, and signing the final loan transaction.
projects.meta: Fixed-rate borrow flow · Route review · Wallet signing

projects.name: EzDeploy
projects.desc: Self-hosted deployment platform. Push to GitHub, get a live URL on a unique subdomain. Isolated Docker build container per deploy, real-time log streaming.
projects.meta: Zero-config deploys · Real-time logs · Unique subdomains

projects.name: One Click Indexer
projects.desc: Turn a Solana program ID into a runnable SQD indexer in one flow. Paste a program ID, inspect live Portal samples, generate a starter indexer, preview the files, and export the whole project as a ZIP.
projects.meta: SQD indexer generator · Live data sampling · ZIP export

projects.name: yield.sol
projects.desc: Earn yield on your USD stablecoins, right from your wallet. A non-custodial frontend for earning APY on USDC, USDT, PYUSD, and USDS through marginfi on Solana.

awards.title: Colosseum Codex Feature
awards.desc: Highlighted in official Solana newsletter for developer education impact.

awards.title: Smart India Hackathon — 1st Place (₹100,000)
awards.desc: Team Leader. Top 0.375% from 80,000+ teams nationwide.

awards.title: Superteam India Member
awards.desc: Active contributor to Solana ecosystem and developer community.
